Package com.pax.poslink.formManage

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DoSignature
    Used to do signature with POS directly.
    DoSignatureRequest  
    DoSignatureResponse  
    InputText
    Used to get text input.
    ShowDialog
    Show a half screen with title and buttons.
    ShowDialogForm
    Show a dialog form to allow user to do single or multiple selection.
    ShowDialogFormRequest  
    ShowDialogFormResponse  
    ShowDialogRequest  
    ShowDialogResponse  
    ShowItem
    Used to display itemized product info, Similar logic as the SHOWMESSAGE.
    ShowItemRequest  
    ShowItemResponse  
    ShowMessage
    Terminal can display 5 line messages, if no clear message received.
    ShowMessageRequest  
    ShowMessageResponse  
    ShowTextBox
    This command is used for showing a text box on terminal.
    ShowTextBoxRequest  
    ShowTextBoxResponse
